basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website BITS Pilani. Has been announced through the BITS Pilani Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/BTech in Electronics/Electrical/Instrumentation or related areas, MSc in Physics/Electronics or related areas
qualification.details: BE/BTech in Electronics/Electrical/Instrumentation or related areas MSc in Physics/Electronics or related areas

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate-1 position at BITS Pilani is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a BE/BTech in Electronics/Electrical/Instrumentation or related fields, or an MSc in Physics/Electronics or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 31,000 plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA) per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line clearly states the post applied for.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-1 role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online or Personal Interview to assess the suitability of the candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate-1 position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Goa.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article, where a direct download link is provided.
